name: Ableton Live
notes: Use one bank per device rack or mixer page.
Map encoder turns to CC and switches to momentary toggles or clip functions.
Keep encoder MIDI channels grouped per bank to simplify Live remote scripts.
setup_steps: Create a MIDI mapping layer in Live and enable Remote for the Twister input port.
Load the exported JSON as a reference while assigning CC numbers in MIDI Map Mode.
Reserve one bank for transport or device macros to keep navigation consistent.
